headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Tech And Telecom Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: In times of market turbulence, investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks. Benzinga provides analyst ratings for high dividend payouts in communication services sector.

headline: Omnicom Group: A Top-Tier 4.1% Yield Built On The World's Best Data Refinery
summary: Omnicom (OMC) is the best data play in 2026. A top-tier 4.1% yield, A- profitability, and a 46% P/E discount make this a conviction Strong Buy. See more here.
